top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
AND d.A3 = (SELECT MAX(A3) FROM district WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia');

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
  AND d.A3 = (
    SELECT A3 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
    ORDER BY A4 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  );

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
AND d.A3 = (SELECT MAX(A3) FROM district WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia');

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
AND d.A3 = (
    SELECT A3 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
    ORDER BY A3 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

  AND d.A3 = (
    SELECT A3

    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
    ORDER BY A4 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  );

FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
AND d.A3 = (SELECT MAX(A3) FROM district WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia');

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
AND d.A3 = (
    SELECT A3 
    FROM district

    ORDER BY A3 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
  AND d.A3 = (
    SELECT A3 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
    ORDER BY A4 DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  );

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia'
AND d.A3 = (SELECT MAX(A3) FROM district WHERE A2 = 'South Bohemia');
